 &#xA0;

20-F X Form 40-F &#xA0; 

 &#xA0; 

 &#xA0; &#xA0; 

&#xA0;26 May 2026 

&#xA0; 

HSBC HOLDINGS PLC 

ISSUANCE OF SENIOR UNSECURED NOTES 

&#xA0; 

&#xA0; 

On 26 May 2026, HSBC Holdings plc issued A$450,000,000
Fixed-to-Floating Rate Senior Unsecured Notes due 26 May 2032,
A$400,000,000 Fixed-to-Floating Rate Senior Unsecured Notes due 26
May 2037 and A$550,000,000 Floating Rate Senior Unsecured Notes due
26 May 2032 (together, the&#xA0;' Notes ') under its A$50,000,000,000 Debt Issuance
Programme. 

&#xA0; 

Application has been made to list the Notes on the Official List of
the Irish Stock Exchange plc trading as Euronext Dublin
(' Euronext
Dublin ') and to trade the Notes
on the Global Exchange Market of Euronext
Dublin. 

&#xA0; 

Investor enquiries to: 

&#xA0; 

Greg Case &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0;
&#xA0; &#xA0;+44 (0) 20 7992 3825 &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0;
&#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0;&#xA0; investorrelations@hsbc.com 

&#xA0; 

Media enquiries to: 

&#xA0; 

Press Office &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0;
&#xA0; +44 (0) 20 7991 8096 &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0;
&#xA0; &#xA0; &#xA0;&#xA0; pressoffice@hsbc.com 

&#xA0; 

&#xA0; 

Note to editors: 

&#xA0; 

HSBC Holdings plc 

 &#xA0; 

HSBC Holdings plc, the parent company of HSBC, is headquartered in
London. HSBC serves customers worldwide from offices in 56
countries and territories. With assets of US$3,306bn at 31 March
2026, HSBC is one of the world's largest banking and financial
services organisations. 

&#xA0; 

DISCLAIMER - INTENDED ADDRESSEES 

&#xA0; 

The Notes have not been and will not be registered under the United
States Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the ' Securities
Act '), or any state securities
laws and, unless so registered, may not be offered or sold within
the United States or to, or for the account or the benefit of, US
persons, as defined in Regulation S under the Securities Act,
except pursuant to an exemption from or in a transaction not
subject to the registration requirements of the Securities Act and
in compliance with any applicable state securities
laws. 

&#xA0; 

ends/all 

 &#xA0; 

 &#xA0;

 &#xA0;

to the requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, the
registrant has duly caused this report to be signed on its behalf
by the undersigned, thereunto duly authorized.
